inputs.prompt: Programme: 'The Fix' — a new weekly 1-hour radio programme about solutions journalism. Format: Features, interviews, and listener interaction focused on things that are actually working — in health, education, housing, environment. Target audience: 30-55, socially engaged, frustrated by negative news cycles. Tone: Optimistic but not naive, journalistic, warm. Station: National public radio network. Slot: Sunday mornings, 10-11am.
Programme: music and talk show for a community radio station. 2 hours, weekday afternoons. Focus on local arts and culture.

Programme: 'Border Stories' — a new fortnightly 45-minute radio documentary strand for a European public broadcaster. Format: Single-topic audio documentaries exploring life in border regions across Europe. Target audience: 35+, interested in European culture and identity, documentary listeners. Tone: Thoughtful, intimate, journalistic. Platform: ARD Audiothek (on-demand) and live broadcast on Deutschlandfunk Kultur. Language: German, with subtitled versions for partner broadcasters.
